name: Chocolate Popcorn Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add sugar, sweetened condensed milk, water, butter, and salt to the melted chocolate.
3. Heat mixture until it reaches the soft ball stage (234 - 238°F).
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
5. Gradually fold in the popped corn until well combined.
6. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
7. Stir until creamy and smooth.
8. Pour the fudge into a shallow, buttered pan.
9. Let it set completely at room temperature.
10. Cut into squares once firm.
